fields.label: Template Code
fields.description: Unique identifier for the template (e.g., ORDER_CONFIRMATION_EMAIL)

fields.label: Template Name
fields.description: Human-readable name for the template

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Whether this template is active and can be used for sending notifications

fields.label: Is Default
fields.description: Set as default template for this event type and channel

fields.label: Notification Channel
fields.options:
Email
Push Notification
SMS
In-App
Webhook
fields.description: The delivery channel for this notification

fields.label: Event Type
fields.options:
General
Order Created
Order Confirmed
Order Shipped
Order Delivered
Order Cancelled
Payment Received
Payment Failed
Payment Reminder
RFQ Created
RFQ Response Received
RFQ Expired
Quotation Received
Quotation Accepted
Quotation Rejected
Sample Request Created
Sample Request Approved
Sample Request Rejected
Sample Shipped
Message Received
Seller Verification
Buyer Verification
Certificate Expiring
Certificate Expired
Low Stock Alert
Price Change Alert
New Product Alert
Welcome Email
Password Reset
Account Deactivated
Back In Stock
Wishlist Share
Wishlist Digest
fields.description: The triggering event for this notification

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Priority level affects delivery order and retry behavior

fields.label: Max Retry Count
fields.description: Number of times to retry if delivery fails (0 to disable)

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: Subject line for email/push notifications (supports Jinja variables)

fields.label: Body (HTML)
fields.description: Rich text body content (supports Jinja templating with variables like {{ buyer_name }})

fields.label: Plain Text Body
fields.description: Plain text version for email fallback and SMS (supports Jinja variables)

fields.label: Available Variables
fields.description: JSON list of variable names available in this template (e.g., ["buyer_name", "order_id", "total_amount"])

fields.label: Example Data
fields.description: Sample data for template preview (JSON object with variable values)

fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: Tenant this template belongs to (leave empty for global templates)

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: Auto-filled from Tenant

fields.label: Is Global
fields.description: Global templates are available to all tenants

fields.label: Sender Email
fields.description: Override default sender email address

fields.label: Sender Name
fields.description: Display name for the sender

fields.label: Reply-To Email
fields.description: Override default reply-to address

fields.label: CC List
fields.description: Comma-separated list of CC email addresses

fields.label: BCC List
fields.description: Comma-separated list of BCC email addresses

fields.label: Push Icon
fields.description: Icon to display with push notification

fields.label: Push Image
fields.description: Large image for expanded push notification

fields.label: Click Action URL
fields.description: URL to open when notification is clicked (supports Jinja variables)

fields.label: Notification Sound
fields.description: Sound to play (default, silent, or custom sound name)

fields.label: SMS Sender ID
fields.description: Sender ID for SMS (alphanumeric, max 11 characters)

fields.label: Max SMS Length
fields.description: Maximum character length for SMS (default 160)

fields.label: Schedule Type
fields.description: When to send notifications using this template

fields.label: Delay Minutes
fields.description: Minutes to wait before sending (for batching or review time)

fields.label: Active From
fields.description: Start time of sending window (e.g., 09:00)

fields.label: Active To
fields.description: End time of sending window (e.g., 18:00)

fields.label: Total Sent
fields.description: Total number of notifications sent using this template

fields.label: Delivered
fields.description: Number of notifications successfully delivered

fields.label: Failed
fields.description: Number of failed delivery attempts

fields.label: Last Sent At
fields.description: Timestamp of the last notification sent

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Brief description of when and why this template is used

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Internal notes for administrators (not visible to end users)
